name: platxa-project-structure
description: Auto-generates Claude Code project structure (.claude/rules, skills, agents, CLAUDE.md, hook suggestions) for any codebase. Analyzes your project, detects tech stack and monorepo patterns, identifies sharp edges, and creates path-scoped rules, project-specific skills with progressive disclosure, domain-matched subagents, and hook recommendations using canonical Claude Code event names (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, InstructionsLoaded).
